ingredients_text: 88% milk chocolate (sugar, cocoa butter, dry whole milk, cocoa mass, soy lecithin [emulsifier], natural vanilla flavoring), 6% coffee biscuit (sugar, wheat flour, wheat starch, coffee powder, margarine [coconut, sunflower oil], flavor, nonfat dry milk, caramel), 6% coffee sponge cake (sugar, wheat flour, margarine [palm, sunflower], glucose syrup, coffee powder, baking soda [leavening], eggs).
